text: Oh great, another Monday morning meeting that could have been an email. Truly living the dream.
Thank you so much for covering my shift yesterday — you really saved me.
Wow, the printer jammed again. What a surprise. Nothing has ever gone this well for me.
The new coffee machine makes genuinely good espresso. I'm impressed.
Sure, take the last parking spot. It's not like I've been circling for twenty minutes or anything.
Congratulations on the promotion! You've earned every bit of it.
Fantastic. My flight is delayed four hours. Exactly the birthday I always wanted.
I finally finished the marathon. Slowest time in my age group, but I finished.
Nice work leaving the code review comments at 11:58pm on Friday. Really felt the love.
The sunset over the lake tonight was unbelievable. I just stood there for ten minutes.
Yeah, I'd love to hear more about your cryptocurrency portfolio. Please, go on.
Honestly, the airline handled the cancellation really well — rebooked me within the hour.
Good thing I studied all weekend for the exam that got cancelled. Time well spent.
My little sister taught herself piano from videos. She played at the wedding and people cried.
Love that the elevator is out again. Six flights of stairs is exactly what my knees needed.
The volunteers rebuilt the whole playground in one weekend. Amazing what a community can do.
Oh no, the meeting ran long and I missed the gym. However will I cope.
The doctor said the recovery is ahead of schedule. Best news we've had all year.
Brilliant idea to schedule the fire drill during the client demo. Ten out of ten planning.
I tried the recipe you sent and the whole family asked for seconds. Keeper!
Well, that went well.
You're such a genius.
Great weather we're having.
I just love waking up at 5am.
That's exactly what I needed today.
Interesting choice of outfit.
He's certainly... enthusiastic.
What a performance.
Couldn't have gone better.
You really outdid yourself this time.
